proposal1.heroHeadline: Lesia is losing 500 hours a year on manual proposals. Here's where the time goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Crafting custom web design proposals manually takes hours. With our system, it's done in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every moment spent on proposals is a missed opportunity for growth.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Each proposal consumes 5 hours of your valuable time. That's time not spent on creating beautiful, user-centric designs.

problems.title: Lost Revenue
problems.description: Delays in proposal delivery can cost up to 10% of potential projects. Quick responses mean more closed deals.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistent branding in proposals can lead to confusion. A single misstep can set back client trust.

problems.title: Client Churn
problems.description: Slow proposals lead to client loss. Every delayed proposal risks losing a client to faster competitors.

problems.title: Resource Misallocation
problems.description: Your team spends 20% of their time on proposals. This diverts focus from design innovation and user experience.

problems.title: High Stress
problems.description: Manual proposal creation is stressful and error-prone. Mistakes can lead to costly revisions or project misalignment.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all of this with fast, reliable automation.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, proposal creation is slow and tedious. Our system generates client-ready proposals in seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Inconsistencies in branding can cause issues. Our system ensures every proposal aligns with your brand perfectly.

solutions.title: Real-time Tracking
solutions.description: Without tracking, follow-ups are guesswork. Our system offers insights and tracking for every proposal sent.

solutions.title: AI Chatbot
solutions.description: Manual client interactions take time. The AI chatbot handles initial queries, freeing up your team.

solutions.title: Brand Analysis
solutions.description: Understanding client brands takes hours. Our system analyzes and integrates brand specifics into each proposal.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Lesia's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Lesia around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Lesia.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Business with User-Centric Design.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will enhance your user experience, ensuring every click counts towards your revenue goals.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every visitor leaving without converting is revenue walking out the door.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rate
problems.description: Currently, 70% of visitors leave without engaging. This is a substantial loss in potential revenue and customer engagement.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: A 60% bounce rate means a majority of your audience isn't finding what they need, leading to missed opportunities.

problems.title: Poor Mobile Experience
problems.description: With 50% of traffic coming from mobile, a clunky experience means losing half of your potential customers.

problems.title: Outdated Design
problems.description: An outdated look can reduce customer trust by 30%, impacting brand reputation and sales.

problems.title: Slow Loading Times
problems.description: Every extra second in load time can cause a 20% drop in conversions, hurting your bottom line.

problems.title: Ineffective SEO
problems.description: Ranking lower in search results leads to a 40% decrease in organic traffic, which directly affects sales.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Let's tackle these issues with targeted solutions.

solutions.title: UX Design
solutions.description: We create intuitive designs that guide users seamlessly, reducing bounce rates and increasing engagement.

solutions.title: Responsive Design
solutions.description: Ensuring a smooth experience across all devices, we capture and retain mobile users effectively.

solutions.title: Performance Optimization
solutions.description: By improving load times, we enhance user satisfaction and boost your conversion rates.

solutions.title: SEO Strategy
solutions.description: Our SEO expertise improves your search rankings, driving more organic traffic to your site.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Here's why Lesia is the right choice for Acme Corp.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: With years of experience, we've driven measurable success for our clients.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Approach
whyUsCards.description: We work closely with you to ensure our solutions align perfectly with your goals.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Our creative strategies set us apart, delivering unique results.

whyUsCards.title: Results-Driven
whyUsCards.description: We focus on outcomes, ensuring every project contributes to your success.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team that's ready to transform your business.

team.name: Lesia Payne
team.role: Company Owner And Lead Ux Designer
team.bio: Lesia leads our strategy with a keen eye for design. She excels in creating meaningful client relationships.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery and Planning
process.description: We dive deep into understanding your business and its needs.

process.title: Design and Prototyping
process.description: Creating wireframes and prototypes that align with your goals.

process.title: Development and Testing
process.description: Building and rigorously testing to ensure quality and performance.

process.title: Launch and Optimization
process.description: Final launch and continuous optimization for ongoing success.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Choose the investment option that best suits your needs.

pricing.name: Basic Package
pricing.description: Ideal for small projects and quick wins.

pricing.name: Growth Package
pricing.description: Recommended for most businesses aiming for growth.

pricing.name: Enterprise Package
pricing.description: For large-scale projects with complex needs.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's chat about how we can help. No pressure, just possibilities.

lead.company_description:
We partner for postive change. 

We work with partners whose mission we connect with—who are working to make the world better. For the past decade, we have put our time and expertise as designers, developers and UX strategists towards improving our community and giving back wherever we can.

We don't just design websites. We create valuable tools and information that your customers, clients and staff can actually use.

Whether we are doing graphic design or web development, our focus is usability so anyone can find what they are looking for, fast. Putting users first helps them find your website and helps your business grow.

Services include:
Responsive website design
User Experience (UX) design
Wireframing
Art direction
Logo design
Print graphic design
Signage and display design
Business card design
Packaging design
Trade show booth and banner design
Custom web development 
Customized Squarespace Websites
Information Architecture
Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
User-testing
Tree testing
QA testing
Website & usability audits
Web applications
Mobile web applications
